subject: SDNC propagation of RequestID & PartnerName to AAI
commit_message:
SDNC propagation of RequestID & PartnerName to AAI

Currently, SDNC generates a random uuid for every request to AAI using
method getNextTransactionId() in class AAIService.java. A change is made
to first get the value from MDC and if this is missing, a new RequestId
is generated and set as MDC.
Also, X-FromAppId is set as ONAP which is more generic. This is changed
to SDNC in file aaiclient.properties.

Change-Id: Ib31fbf560f4a8f3b1fa6bbaec087718eeb937f14
Issue-ID: SDNC-68
Signed-off-by: vaibhav.jain1 <vaibhav.jain1@amdocs.com>

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

I'd like to block this until Dan has a say here. It looks like this has been moved to https://git.onap.org/ccsdk/sli/adaptors/tree/aai-service/provider/src/main/java/org/onap/ccsdk/sli/adaptors/aai

However when we removed code from sdnc/adaptors we did not remove aai-service, even though it was added to ccsdk. I think this was an oversight.

If this was intentionally left in SDNC - this can go forward here, if not I think it will have to be moved to ccsdk/sli/adaptors.

I'll check with Dan or he can answer here.
